jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
